name: High-converting landing page
description: Builds a complete landing page optimized for conversion — strategy, copy, design and technical implementation.

elicitation.question: What is the product or service?
What is the main offer and CTA?

steps.title: Define conversion structure
steps.prompt_template: Define the conversion structure for {product}. Audience: {audience}. Offer: {offer}.

steps.title: Write all copy
steps.prompt_template: Write complete copy for the {product} landing page. All sections with headline variants and CTAs.

steps.title: Design and implement
steps.prompt_template: Implement the landing page for {product} in {stack}. Mobile-first, fast loading.

steps.title: Add tracking
steps.prompt_template: Add conversion tracking: page_view, cta_click, form_submit events.

command_template:
Build a high-converting landing page for {product}.

Audience: {audience} | Main offer: {offer} | Stack: {stack}

1. SKILL-FUNNEL-BUILDER → Structure: hero, problem, solution, proof, objections, CTA.

2. Write all copy: 3 headline variants, subheadlines, body addressing top 3 objections, CTA variants.

3. SKILL-FRONTEND-DESIGN → Implement in {stack}: mobile-first, under 2s load, accessible.

4. Tracking → page_view, cta_click, form_submit events.
author: fluxrow
